reason: Dumb & Dumber’s two dimwits on a cross-country trip deliver nonstop slapstick.
Hot Shots! Part Deux bombs every sense with absurd, over-the-top gags.
Billy Madison’s childish antics repeat grades for maximum goofy payoff.
Happy Gilmore’s hockey-to-golf chaos is uproariously no-stakes fun.
Ace Ventura’s pet-obsessed sleuth unleashes unhinged, zany energy.
Austin Powers’s swinging sixties spy shtick oozes cheeky camp humor.
Beavis and Butt-Head Do America shrugs off logic for juvenile laughs.
Monty Python’s Life of Brian blends surreal silliness with outrageous wit.
Robin Hood: Men in Tights fires punny arrows straight into slapstick territory.
Major Payne’s ex-Marine meets kids for a hilariously over-the-top ride.
